text: わお！　本当に全部倒しちゃったよ。

これは認めざるをえないね。
いやホント、想像以上の腕前だったよ。

今回はわがまま聞いてくれて、ありがとう。
これからの活躍、期待
What? You really defeated all of them!

I admit I'm impressed. Wow, I wasn't expecting you to be even better than the
rumors suggested.
Thanks for going along with that. I can't wait to see what else you can do.
